vocab.meaning: ốc đảo yên tĩnh (giữa nơi ồn ào)
vocab.example: A local library is a perfect tranquil oasis that allows me to disconnect from the digital world.

vocab.meaning: âm thanh hỗn tạp, chói tai
vocab.example: I generally avoid city centers on Saturdays because the cacophony of traffic and shouting crowds is quite jarring.
Spending time in a serene garden is how I recharge my batteries for the upcoming work week.

vocab.meaning: đời sống ban đêm sôi động
vocab.example: Occasionally, I’m drawn to the vibrant nightlife of the city to enjoy the infectious energy of a live band.

vocab.meaning: sự bình yên và tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: After five days of constant meetings, all I crave on a Saturday morning is some peace and quiet.

vocab.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp
vocab.example: I must admit that I sometimes miss the hustle and bustle of a crowded morning market.
The sheer serenity of the lakeside at dawn is enough to wash away all my professional anxieties.

vocab.meaning: không khí mang tính cộng đồng/tập thể
vocab.example: Noisy festivals provide a warm communal atmosphere that you simply can't find in solitary activities.

vocab.meaning: sự biệt lập/ở một mình (một cách tích cực)
vocab.example: I value my solitude on the weekends, so I tend to gravitate towards less frequented hiking trails.

vocab.meaning: môi trường năng lượng cao, đầy phấn khích
vocab.example: A sports stadium is a high-octane environment that offers a thrilling break from my sedentary lifestyle.
